full_prompt: Design a topology-optimized AM Ti-6Al-4V aero bracket in the spirit of a canonical topology-optimized-aero-bracket patent (US11174899B2-style), for a representative aircraft secondary-structure mounting problem with multiple independent interface load cases and a specified mass reduction target versus a baseline milled bracket. Envelope: 220 x 160 x 100 mm. Interfaces: primary mounting side has four M8 bolts on 160 x 60 mm rectangular pattern (equipment-bay frame); secondary mounting side has two M10 pin bearings of 12 mm diameter spaced 80 mm apart. Material: AM Ti-6Al-4V Grade 5 post-HIP (yield 860 MPa, UTS 930 MPa, E 113.8 GPa, density 4430 kg/m^3, min elongation 10%). Representative load vectors following the patent's multi-case layout (magnitudes are placeholders when specific patent values are not pinned): LC1 axial tension 12 kN along primary mounting axis; LC2 axial compression 12 kN same axis; LC3 transverse 8 kN perpendicular; LC4 vertical 10 kN; LC5 combined LC1 + LC4 at 75% each (9 + 7.5 kN); LC6 ultimate = 1.5 x the envelope of LC1-5. The central technical feature is that the bracket geometry comes from a topology-optimization solution whose design variables are density field elements with a minimum member size (stated in the patent as approximately 2 mm for AM Ti) and a symmetry constraint about the primary mounting plane. Pass/fail: (R1) max von Mises at limit (LC1-5) <= yield = 860 MPa with no permanent deformation; (R2) max von Mises at ultimate LC6 <= UTS = 930 MPa (per CS-25/MIL-HDBK-5 airframe ultimate factor 1.5 built into LC6); (R3) mass reduction vs baseline milled bracket filling the 220x160x100 envelope >= 45% (the patent's stated technical effect, typical 40-50% for Ti topo-opt AM brackets); (R4) first natural mode frequency >= 160 Hz (typical airframe equipment decoupling target); (R5) minimum printed member size >= 2 mm (AM manufacturability + patent constraint); (R6) symmetry about primary mounting plane preserved in final geometry (patent claim element); (R7) linear buckling eigenvalue under LC2 worst-compression case >= 1.5 (CS-25 ultimate). Deliverables: STEP AP242 + 3MF of the final topo-opt body; optimization history log with compliance vs iteration; modal analysis; FEA report per load case; mass-vs-baseline ratio.
short_prompt:
Design a topology-optimized AM Ti-6Al-4V aero bracket in the spirit of a canonical topology-optimized-aero-bracket patent (US11174899B2-style), for an aircraft secondary-structure mounting problem with multiple independent interface load cases and a stated mass-reduction target vs a baseline milled bracket.

Envelope: 220 x 160 x 100 mm. Primary mounting: four M8 bolts on 160 x 60 mm. Secondary mounting: two M10 pin bearings of 12 mm diameter spaced 80 mm apart.

Material: AM Ti-6Al-4V Grade 5 post-HIP.

Design per CS-25/MIL-HDBK-5 airframe ultimate factor 1.5 built into LC6; topology optimization with minimum member size ~2 mm for AM Ti and symmetry constraint about the primary mounting plane.

Load cases (magnitudes placeholder when patent values not pinned).
- LC1 axial tension 12 kN along primary mounting axis.
- LC2 axial compression 12 kN same axis.
- LC3 transverse 8 kN perpendicular.
- LC4 vertical 10 kN.
- LC5 combined LC1 + LC4 at 75% each (9 + 7.5 kN).
- LC6 ultimate = 1.5 x the envelope of LC1-5.

Additional gates: mass reduction >= 45% vs milled baseline; first natural mode >= 160 Hz; minimum printed member >= 2 mm; symmetry preserved; linear buckling eigenvalue under LC2 >= 1.5.

requires_non_fea_solver.reason: Central patent feature. Outer loop around the structural FEA.

prompt.title: AM Ti-6Al-4V topology-optimized aero bracket (topology-optimized-aero-bracket patent US11174899B2 style)
prompt.brief: Design a 220x160x100 mm topo-opt Ti-6Al-4V aero bracket with 6 load cases, symmetry constraint, min member 2 mm, and >=45% mass reduction vs baseline milled bracket.

requirements.governing_standard: CS-25.305 + MIL-HDBK-5J allowables + AMS 4928 (HIP'd Ti-6Al-4V AM)

analysis_types: topology optimization outer loop + linear static x6 + modal + buckling

notes.patent_fetch: Load vectors are plausible placeholders; actual US11174899B2 tables require patent text fetch. needs_patent_fetch = true at root.
notes.numeric_source: CS-25 + AM Ti-6Al-4V post-HIP allowables per AMS 4928.
